_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Lambda phosphatase treatment (λ-Ph) induced indeed a shift in PDLIM2 immunoreactive band compared to non-treated (NT) control
details: Successfully confirmed phosphorylation status of PDLIM2 through lambda phosphatase treatment showing band shift
